name: Pumpkin and Maple Sugar Pie
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill Preparation Time: 0:50
1. In a mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except the last two.
2. Pour into the pie shell.
3. Bake at 425 degrees for 15 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to 350 and continue baking for about 45 minutes more, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
5. Cool to room temperature and refrigerate.
6. Garnish with whipped cream if desired.
7. Try to use REAL maple syrup for this pie; it does not taste the same with imitation type.
